Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class DatatypeParser

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.DatatypeParser
public class DatatypeParser extends Object
Parser for IDatatype. This allows to specify a datatype with a simple string which facilitates writing tests.

  • Method Details

    • parse

      public static IDatatype parse(FormulaFactory factory, String specification)
      Returns a datatype instance built with the given factory and satisfying the given specification. Datatype are specified with a simple string, in a manner similar to the following (for the classical List datatype): 
       List[T] ::= nil || cons[head: T; tail: List]
      Parameters:
      factory - some formula factory
      specification - the specification of the datatype as a string
      Returns:
      a datatype instance

    • parse
